title: erythroxylum buxifolium
intro: Erythroxylum buxifolium is a species of flowering plant in the family Erythroxylaceae, commonly known as the box-leaf coca or Peruvian coca. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic effects, making it useful for treating wounds, pain, and fever. The health benefits of Erythroxylum buxifolium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used in traditional medicine in certain regions.
